note: FEATURE LANE: deploy atlas-metrics-live (single-authority 409-proof metrics publisher) -> status/hetzner/metrics-live.json every 30s. Keystone observability fix; deployed via feature lane (parallel to flat).

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS single-authority live metrics (409-proof observability)
After=postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=simple
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/autopull.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/atlas_metrics_live.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=10
Nice=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
